hooks.name: Load Project Context on Session Start
hooks.description: Loads essential project context at the start of every session so Kiro is immediately oriented

action.prompt:
A new session has started for the Payment Dispute Triage project. Before doing anything else, orient yourself:

1. Read .kiro/steering/product.md — understand the domain, enumerations, and user journeys
2. Read .kiro/steering/structure.md — understand the file layout, data model, and API endpoints
3. Read .kiro/steering/rules.md — understand the triage rule precedence and business parameters
4. Read .kiro/steering/tech.md — understand the stack and available commands

Key things to keep in mind:
- Enumerations are UPPERCASE (CARD, EFT, SETTLED, RESOLVE_NOW, REFER, etc.) — always use these exact values
- Action display labels: RESOLVE_NOW→'Resolve Immediately', INVESTIGATE→'Investigate Further', ESCALATE→'Escalate', REFER→'Refer to Another Team'
- The project root is Conference/payment-dispute-triage/
- Dispute CRUD routes: /api/disputes and /api/disputes/:id/*
- Utility routes (NOT under /api/disputes): /api/dashboard, /api/enums, /api/rules, /api/seed
- SQLite is the only database — no external services
- Requirements: docs/requirements.md v4.0 (93 requirements)
- Test cases: docs/test-cases.md (103 test cases, 100% coverage)
- UI screens: docs/ui-spec.md (4 screens) — visual rules in .kiro/skills/ui-design.md
- Architecture: docs/architecture.md
- Before generating ANY UI component, read .kiro/skills/ui-design.md first

Confirm you are ready to assist.
